Class SimpleBoard

    • addGarbageToQueue

      public void addGarbageToQueue(int numLines)
      Adds garbage lines to the queue.
      Parameters:
      numLines - Number of garbage lines to add

    • processGarbageQueue

      public boolean processGarbageQueue()
      Processes pending garbage from the queue and adds it to the bottom of the board. Returns true if garbage was added, false otherwise. The matrix is structured as [width][height] = [20][10]. Looking at checkRemoving and how the matrix is accessed: - matrix.length = 20 (width) - matrix[i].length = 10 (height) - matrix[i] represents a row (i from 0 to 19) - matrix[i][j] represents column j in row i (j from 0 to 9) So we have 20 rows and 10 columns, which matches BOARD_HEIGHT=20 and BOARD_WIDTH=10. The bottom row is at index width-1 = 19.

    • counterGarbage

      public int counterGarbage(int linesCleared)
      Counters incoming garbage by removing lines from THIS player's queue when THIS player clears lines. This method only affects the garbage queue of the board instance it's called on. Each player has their own isolated garbageQueue, so this will never affect the opponent's queue.
      Parameters:
      linesCleared - Number of lines cleared by THIS player
      Returns:
      Number of garbage lines that were countered from THIS player's queue

    • getPendingGarbageCount

      public int getPendingGarbageCount()
      Gets the number of pending garbage lines.

    • getGarbageQueue

      public GarbageQueue getGarbageQueue()
      Gets the garbage queue (for external access if needed).
